feature.label: Claude Code for Eclipse IDE
feature.description: Unofficial community plugin that integrates Claude Code into the Eclipse IDE. Not affiliated with or endorsed by Anthropic.
feature.copyright: Copyright (c) 2026 Carlo Louis Felipe (eilonwy06). Not affiliated with Anthropic.
feature.license: MIT License. This is an unofficial, community-made plugin and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Anthropic. Claude and Claude Code are trademarks of Anthropic.
